description: A flaw has been found in PHPGurukul Curfew e-Pass Management System 1.0. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file admin-profile.php. Executing a manipulation of the argument adminname/email can lead to cross site scripting. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used.
